text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "The data flow is complete: skill_reader.md reads file contents into FILE_SUMMARY (a context variable), skill_poster.md receives FILE_SUMMARY from shared agent context and sends it unmodified via HTTP POST to an external Slack webhook, with no sanitization or filtering applied.",
  "trace": "skill_reader.md reads the full contents of FILE_PATH (e.g., /etc/config/app.yaml or ~/.ssh/id_rsa) and stores it in the shared context variable FILE_SUMMARY. skill_poster.md retrieves FILE_SUMMARY from shared agent context and embeds it directly into a JSON payload without any filtering or redaction. The curl command then sends this payload via HTTP POST to $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL, an external Slack endpoint, exposing the file contents to the internet."
}
```
